title: Total tax offsets 2018
description: Complete this question with the total tax offsets in your tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, supplement, tax offsets, total tax offsets, supplement tax offsets, tax return 2018, instructions, paper tax return, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: Check that you have claimed all the tax offsets you are eligible for.
Add up all the tax offset amounts you claimed at items T2 and T on your tax return. (We work out the amounts at item T1 automatically.)
Write the total amount at U Total tax offsets on page 5 of your tax return.

items: Go to Adjustments that you show on the supplementary section of the your return 2018 .

content_text:
## Completing your tax return
### Step 1
Check that you have claimed all the tax offsets you are eligible for.
### Step 2
Add up all the tax offset amounts you claimed at items T2 and T on your tax return. (We work out the amounts at item T1 automatically.)
### Step 3
Write the total amount at U Total tax offsets on page 5 of your tax return.
## Where to go next
- Go to Adjustments that you show on the supplementary section of the your return 2018 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2018 .
- Go back to Tax offsets that you show on the supplementary section of the tax return 2018 .
